questions.q: What is the main job of the judicial branch?
options: To interpret the laws and the Constitution
questions.explanation: Courts resolve disputes and decide what the law and Constitution mean.

questions.q: What is the highest court in the United States?
questions.explanation: The Supreme Court has the final word on federal law and the Constitution.

options: The power of courts to declare laws or actions unconstitutional
A yearly review of all laws
questions.explanation: It lets courts check Congress and the President.
Marbury v. Madison (1803) established the principle.

questions.q: Why do federal judges serve for life during good behavior?
options: So they can decide cases free from political and election pressure
questions.explanation: Independence lets judges rule on the law even when unpopular.
